title: Isolate release checker AI base commit

sources.reason: The current aac2d59 run exposes AI_BASE_COMMIT=f63d5b6 to the release-distribution step and fails scope validation in the temporary project.
baseline_diff gives AI_BASE_COMMIT precedence over Contract baseCommit.
Defines the environment inherited by the public installer journey.

riskAssessment.reason: A job-level governance baseline must not override the temporary adoption Contract baseline.

executionDecision.reason: The failing Actions environment and baseline precedence identify the exact leaked variable.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release fixture subprocesses do not inherit AI_BASE_COMMIT from the caller job.
The temporary adoption journey uses its own Contract baseCommit.
A regression test reproduces the GitHub Actions job-level AI_BASE_COMMIT environment.
check-release-distribution and full project quality checks pass.
guidelines: Do not mutate the caller process environment.
Strip repository and governance baseline overrides from isolated release subprocesses.
Preserve explicit AI_BASE_COMMIT only for the final check-ai-pr command that intentionally supplies the temporary repository base.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
